title: Node acceptance test criteria retrieval
difficulty_justification: Requires reading the architecture spec and extracting all acceptance criteria in detail, including pass/fail thresholds — more than a simple lookup.
query_text: What are the documented acceptance test criteria that new compute nodes must pass before entering production? List all criteria with their pass conditions.

eval_criteria.gold_answer: Per the architecture specification, new nodes must pass all 7 acceptance criteria: 1. BIOS/firmware: vendor-recommended version installed. 2. Memory test: memtest86+ zero errors over 2 passes. 3. CPU stress test: stress-ng 3600s, no thermal throttling. 4. Interconnect bandwidth: InfiniBand ≥ 95% of rated line rate. 5. Storage I/O: node-local fio sequential read ≥ 3 GB/s (NVMe). 6. GPU burn-in (GPU nodes only): gpu-burn 1 hour, zero errors, max temp < 85°C. 7. Integration: node visible in SLURM and passes hello-world MPI job.

checkpoints.binary_pass_condition: final_answer contains at least 6 of the 7 acceptance test criteria
final_answer contains at least one numeric threshold (95%, 3 GB/s, 85°C, etc.)
